name: tacas-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for TACAS (International Conference on Tools and Algorithms for the Construction and Analysis of Systems), the tools-and-algorithms verification conference of ETAPS: routing among TACAS's four paper categories (research, case-study, regular tool, tool-demonstration), the per-category blind model (double-blind research, single-blind tool), the mandatory artifact evaluation that gates tool-paper acceptance, ETAPS Artifact Badges (Available / Functional / Reusable), Springer LNCS gold-open-access proceedings, the EasyChair submission flow, and TACAS's hosting of SV-COMP. Grounded in the TACAS 2026 (ETAPS 2026, Turin) and TACAS 2027 (ETAPS 2027, Copenhagen) calls, the ETAPS joint CfP, Springer LNCS, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
